title: Kabir Singh
tmdbOverview: Kabir, a genius yet hostile medical student, falls in love with Preeti from his college. When Preeti's father spots the couple kissing, he opposes their relationship and decides to marry her off.
synopsis: Kabir Singh is a 2019 drama and romance film from India. It holds a solid 7.0 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 15 certification (GB rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
